mapper.select: SELECT m.id AS clientId, u.nickname AS name, u.age, u.profile_image as profileImage, m.goals, m.height, m.weight, m.purpose, m.experience, m.exerciseCount_goal AS exerciseCountGoal, m.diet, mpt.trainer_id, mpt.next_session, mpt.lesson_count, mpt.last_session, mpt.status FROM MEMBER m JOIN USER u ON m.user_id = u.id JOIN MEMBERSHIP_PT mpt ON mpt.id = ( SELECT id FROM MEMBERSHIP_PT WHERE member_id = m.id ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1 ) WHERE m.id = #{clientId} AND u.is_deleted = 0
